1: Yea, in the shadow of thy wings will I make my refuge, until these these calamities be overpast.
2: Unto God that performeth all things all things for me.
3: God shall send forth his mercy and his truth.
4: Even Even the sons of men, whose teeth are are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.
5: Let Let thy glory be be above all the earth.
6: They have digged a pit before me, into the midst whereof they are fallen themselves themselves . Selah. Selah.
7: I will sing and give praise.
8: I myself myself will awake early.
9: I will sing unto thee among the nations.
10: And thy truth unto the clouds.
11: Let Let thy glory be be above all the earth.
